feedback.text: As a citizen of Croatia I would like to politely ask that the Digital Fairness Act take a look at the Stop Destroying Videogames Imitative and add a clause to protect video games, and other digital media. Too often are consumers defrauded by big corporations in their thirst for greed and money at the expense of consumers who purchased a digital product. Publishers and big corporations have an overwhelming amount of power over consumers in way that allow them to strip purchases we made away from us without refunds or repercussions! Help us fight this!
